title: PipeShare site menu identity and Wasabi ACL routing
description:
PipeShare now shows user identity and theme controls in the site menu (dbg127), using shared site-menu-identity.js and portal shell styling aligned with PipeSync.

On the backend, portal file and share routes use live Postgres for job access checks when Wasabi portal-data-primary is enabled, and permission-related SQL is routed to Postgres instead of the Wasabi adapter. That fixes "Portal Wasabi adapter does not support this query shape" for customer users loading the file tree.

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: PipeShare site menu: user identity and theme selector (dbg127).
Shared site-menu-identity.js; portal shell CSS; cache bust dbg127.
Portal ACL checks use aclPool on share-link and file routes.
portalPermissionsLivePostgresSql routes membership and folder grants to Postgres under Wasabi primary.
